home.hero_subtitle: Every image tells a story. Be the one at its heart.
home.intro_title: Natural, refined photography in Budapest and nearby
home.intro_body: My goal is not only to deliver beautiful images, but to guide you through a thoughtful and comfortable experience.
home.intro_who_body: Richard, with calm guidance, natural direction, and careful retouching focused on timeless results.
home.intro_where_body: Mainly in Budapest and nearby, outdoors, in urban settings, or in a pre-arranged interior location.
home.intro_what_body: Honest portraits, couple sessions, or business images you will feel confident using.
